title: Regret (Not an Apology)
content:
Regret (Not an Apology)


A man is only as loyal as their options.

INT. CAR - DAY

A man, HIM, wrestles with candy packages, then shoves an assortment of candies into his mouth, and chews nervously.


EXT. UNIVERSITY BUILDING - SIDE STREET

Close On a pair of sock less sneaker-ed feet walking towards us, tilt up to reveal the woman’s excited reaction by the appearance of the car and the driver.

She walks closer to the car; knocks on the glass.

He opens the window.

Friend
Wanna go to The Irishman?

Him
No not again.

Friend
Are you just gonna take me home?

Him
Let’s go.

Friend
Go where?

Him
Just go. Far away. Happily ever after.

Friend
What are you talking about?
context: From document: Regret (Not an Apology) — chunk 1 (chunk 1/2)
